name: Ancient Orb
description: Enigmatic and extremely old, this is an artifact of the Eternal Forest. It floats in the air by unknown means.

name: Beetle Mound
description: A strange pillar of soil that produces Beetles endlessly or until it's destroyed.

name: Boulder
description: A hard rock that's very heavy, but you can move it if you really push.

name: Brazier
description: Stand near this portable fire pit and bask in its warming glow to stave off the cold.

name: Carrot
description: Harvested fresh from a field northwest of Hyrule Castle, this carrot is quite sweet. Horses come running for them.

name: Cat Statue
description: A lithe statue with a mark on its forehead and rounded features. Its cunning eyes stare into the distance.

name: Cloud
description: The Still World has petrified this cloud into something you can stand on for a short while.

name: Decorative Shrub
description: An ornamental plant hardy enough to support a person on its bushy leaves.

name: Elephant Statue
description: An impressive statue with a long trunk and polished tusks. Its knowing eyes stare into the distance.

name: Firework
description: This device, crowning achievement of its Goron artisan, launches three fireworks in a row.

name: Flying Tile
description: This magical floor tile flies at any who come near. If you stand on top of it, you can briefly fly with it.

name: Gerudo Pot
description: A fine pot with vibrant colors to catch the eye. It is typical in Gerudo culture and has been for ages.

name: Grilled Fish
description: This perfectly grilled, flaky fish can instantly entice certain monsters with its irresistible, savory aroma.

name: Hawk Statue
description: A pointed statue with folded wings and a hooked beak. Its sharp eyes stare into the distance.

name: Hyrule Castle Pot
description: An elegant pot from Hyrule Castle, clearly made with love and great effort.

name: Ice Block
description: Like most ice, this block slides when pushed and floats in water. It also melts in the heat, again like most ice.

name: Lava Rock
description: Eldin Volcano is home to many rocks like this one. It is heat resistant and won't crumble, even in lava.

name: Meat
description: A large hunk of bone-in meat that has been restored to glistening. Its dripping juices entice certain monsters.

name: Old Bed
description: This bed is a bit worn out, but you'll still get sleepy if you lie down on it.

name: Pot
description: A simple pot of a common type. It is big enough for a person to fit inside.

name: Rock
description: An ordinary rock that might be found anywhere. Good for throwing.

name: Rock Roast
description: Considered a Goron delicacy, this meal is beyond the chewing power of the average Hylian.

name: Sign
description: A simple sign made of wooden planks. These stand all over Hyrule.

name: Snake Statue
description: A foreboding statue with a raised head and a coiled tail. Its cold eyes stare into the distance.

name: Snowball
description: This large ball of snow rolls quickly downhill. While it's painful to be struck by, it is surprisingly fragile.

name: Soft Bed
description: It's easy to just close your eyes and drift away on this soft, well-maintained bed.

name: Spiked Roller
description: A large log with many knobbly bits sticking out of it. Rolls downhill until something stops it.

name: Stuffed Toy
description: A cute little plush guy. For creepy, unknown reasons, ghosts are drawn to it.

name: Table
description: A small, low table, strong enough for a person to stand on.

name: Trampoline
description: This children's toy of springy cloth on a wooden frame lets you jump higher than usual if you hop onto it.

name: Water Block
description: Liquid in a cube shape. If laid next to others, you can swim through them.

name: Wind Cannon
description: An arcane device that continually blows a strong wind straight ahead that can disperse sand or extinguish flames.

name: Wooden Box
description: A large, wooden box made of planks that is light enough to float on water.

name: Zelda's Bed
description: There's no better place to sleep than your own bed from your own castle.

name: Albatrawl
description: A patient hunter of the air, this monster can suddenly dive, even into the water, to catch its prey.

name: Armos
description: This living statue tirelessly patrols back and forth in a straight path, never wavering, always facing directly ahead.

name: Aruroda
description: From out of the vast and trackless desert comes this one-eyed menace. It tries to get behind foes to sting them.

name: Baby Gohma
description: This creature slings sticky webs at foes to slow them down. The webs are curiously flammable though.

name: Ball-and-Chain Trooper
description: Armored from head to toe, this mighty monster swings a ball and chain that can shatter some things on impact.

name: Beakon
description: Persistent and loud, this monster follows its prey and calls for nearby allies to attack on its behalf.

name: Beamos
description: Any foe in this strange creature's field of vision will be struck by its eyebeams. Under threat, it hardens like rock.

name: Beetle
description: This small monster isn't very strong but can overwhelm the unwary in great numbers.

name: Bio Deku Baba
description: Capable of swallowing whole anything that approaches it, this fearsome plant is vulnerable to having its head pulled.

name: Biri
description: Electrically charged, this floating creature zaps an area around itself. Its field reaches further in water.

name: Bombfish
description: This dangerous fish explodes at the slightest impact and is capable of breaking weakened walls.

name: Boomerang Boarblin
description: Trained in the use of boomerangs, this Boarblin warrior is dangerous both coming and going.

name: Boomerang Boarblin Lv. 2
description: Having mastered the boomerang, this Boarblin has deadly aim. Its sharpened boomerangs are quick and accurate.

name: Buzz Blob
description: Slow-moving but powerfully charged with electricity, this creature's shock field is even wider in water.

name: Caromadillo
description: This monster lives in the caves or on plains, recklessly charging everything it sees. It holds its tail to roll, bouncing off walls.

name: Caromadillo Lv. 2
description: A powerful monster that hurls itself with incredible momentum, flying over holes with ease.

name: Chompfin
description: This jagged-toothed bully rules the water, chomping and spinning with a slap of its tail.

name: Club Boarblin
description: A brute of the northern Gerudo Desert, this creature bounds directly at foes and lays into them with its club.

name: Club Boarblin Lv. 2
description: This desert-dwelling warrior wields a club and shield. Fiercely territorial, it will pursue intruders doggedly.

name: Crawltula
description: A spidery monster that does not spin webs but does walk on walls and ceilings as easily as flat ground.

name: Crow
description: Roosting in high-up spots, this bird monster swoops down to seal people's rupees.

name: Darknut
description: A martial monster in sturdy armor. It is slow and plodding, but its armor makes it utterly immune to blunt-force attacks.

name: Darknut Lv. 2
description: This elite monster wears bright armor that protects against most attacks. Its powerful axe cleaves through foes.

name: Darknut Lv. 3
description: Huge and powerful, this Darknut variant wears armor that can even protect it from arrows.

name: Deku Baba
description: Aggressive and immobile, this plant reaches for anything that gets near. It is vulnerable to having its head pulled.

name: Deku Baba Lv. 2
description: A ferocious plant that uses its large mouth to snap at and swallow enemies. Its hard head protects it from attacks.

name: Drippitune
description: This amphibious monster's croaking song can call rain from a cloudless sky.

name: Electric Keese
description: Wreathed in electricity, this flying monster shocks and paralyzes any foe it touches. Its field reaches further in water.

name: Electric Wizzrobe
description: A potent electricity wielder, this creature warps across the sky, firing lightning-fast bolts that shock targets.

name: Fire Keese
description: This flying monster burns hot enough to ignite anything it touches but will be destroyed by a stiff wind.

name: Fire Octo
description: This Octorok variety has adapted to its volcanic habitat, using its high internal temperature to spit fiery rocks.

name: Fire Wizzrobe
description: This Wizzrobe variety has adapted to its volcanic habitat, using its high internal temperature to toss flaming slashes.

name: Freezard
description: On spotting an enemy, this monster will blow out icy breath as it implacably pursues its quarry.

name: Freeze Slug
description: Lurking on the walls and floors of the coldest places, this creature leaves a path of freezing ice behind it.

name: Ghini
description: Eternally lonely, this one-eyed ghost has an unfortunate tendency to lick potential friends.

name: Ghini Lv. 2
description: The largest type of Ghini, this monster has a huge eyeball and tongue to match its stature.

name: Ghirro
description: This airborne pest hinders foes with its powerful breath. The gale is strong enough to shove a person around.

name: Giant Goponga Flower
description: Native to the Faron Wetlands, this monstrous plant spits large clusters of dangerous pollen at enemies.

name: Gibdo
description: A bandaged monster that can stop foes in their tracks. It is weak to fire, though, and will flee in a panic if exposed to it.

name: Gibdo Lv. 2
description: Terrifying and driven by vengeance, this bandaged horror transforms into a ReDead when set on fire.

name: Goo Specter
description: A gooey nightmare that flattens itself to the ground, making it impossible to attack.

name: Guay
description: Soaring implacably above Hyrule Field, this winged monster dives to attack prey with its sharp beak.

name: Gustmaster
description: Entirely immobile, this unusual creature intermittently blows gusts of air strong enough to lift a person off their feet.

name: Hoarder
description: Naturally camouflaged, this creature hides underground until an unwary foe approaches the mushrooms on its back.

name: Holmill
description: This monster digs holes in soft earth. Sometimes these holes can be entrances to hard-to-reach places.

name: Hydrozol
description: A Zol variant that grows when exposed to water. Its liquid surface makes it immune to fire.

name: Ice Keese
description: A flying monster shrouded in a zone of frigid air that can freeze enemies solid.

name: Ice Octo
description: This monster freezes foes with icy spit. The cold within it leaks out of its head.

name: Ice Wizzrobe
description: A mighty caster of ice magic, this creature warps across the sky, freezing enemies with frigid blasts.

name: Ignizol
description: A white Zol with a flame on top of it. Anything it touches is set ablaze.

name: Keese
description: A monster resembling a bat. If you hold one aloft and step off a ledge, you can glide a bit.

name: Leever
description: A patient, subterranean monster, it waits for prey, then bursts to the surface, rotating its blades to attack.

name: Lizalfos
description: A hunter by nature, this creature wields a razor-sharp spear. It stabs prey with blinding speed.

name: Lizalfos Lv. 2
description: Nimble and lizard-like, this creature is resistant to fire and able to leap into close combat from great distances.

name: Lizalfos Lv. 3
description: This massive Lizalfos is native to the Faron Wetlands. It is resistant to fire and is also at home underwater.

name: Lynel
description: The most fearsome monster in all of Hyrule, this brute annihilates foes with mighty swings of its sword.

name: Mini-Moldorm
description: Skittering through its mountainous home on many legs, this creature's quick and erratic movements confound foes.

name: Moa
description: Fiercely protective of its allies, this floating monster fires eyebeams at foes. With no one to protect, it calms down.

name: Mothula
description: This insect creature blasts through the air when it spots an enemy. While fast, it can't stop quickly.

name: Mothula Lv. 2
description: This powerful Mothula lives in the wetlands. Attacks won't stop this flying juggernaut while it is blasting forward.

name: Needlefly
description: Highly intelligent, this large insect is a master of finding the perfect moment to attack.

name: Octorok
description: Found in and around water, this octopus-like creature spits small rocks at its enemies, with impressive range.

name: Pathblade
description: This monster charges ahead, spinning its sharp blades, then returns to its starting point. Its unending motion blocks paths.

name: Peahat
description: A large plant creature that spins its spiky roots to attack. Like most plants, it is vulnerable to fire.

name: Piranha
description: Long fins and remarkable ferocity define this underwater predator. It pursues its prey relentlessly.

name: Platboom
description: An unusual monster that tries to crush anything that approaches. The brave can ride it to high-up places, however.

name: Poe
description: A mischievous spirit that uses its lantern to set things on fire. When chased, it can slip through walls to escape.

name: ReDead
description: Endlessly wandering the Gerudo Desert, this unsettling creature's screams can freeze enemies in their tracks.

name: Ribbitune
description: An amphibious crooner whose golden croaks draw other monsters to it, which can be useful as a trap.

name: Rope
description: A snakelike monster that rushes at its prey headlong. Able to dodge airborne foes' attacks with ease.

name: Sand Crab
description: This crablike monster attacks with its powerful claws as it skitters to and fro.

name: Sand Piranha
description: Vigorous and quick, this fishlike creature swims through sand with ease. It cannot survive in water, however.

name: Sea Urchin
description: An unmoving aquatic monster with hard spines that can pierce metal.

name: Snomaul
description: A strange and hostile collection of living snowballs, this creature's true body is the head. It can regrow lost snowballs.

name: Spark
description: A strange entity that moves along walls. It is wreathed in electricity and will shock anything it comes in contact with.

name: Spear Moblin
description: A brutish monster found all over Hyrule. Its hurled spears can reach even high-up targets.

name: Spear Moblin Lv. 2
description: This Moblin throws spears relentlessly, keeping foes at bay. Its arcing throws can reach even distant enemies.

name: Strandtula
description: A spidery monster that spins thread to dangle from ceilings. The thread is strong but quite flammable.

name: Sword Moblin
description: A brutish monster that fights with a sword. Its kind are fiercely territorial and form groups throughout the land.

name: Sword Moblin Lv. 2
description: This strong Moblin is common all over Hyrule. It blocks with its shield but struggles when its attacks are blocked.

name: Sword Moblin Lv. 3
description: A veteran Moblin that has mastered using its huge sword and shield to cut down all opponents.

name: Tangler
description: Nearly spherical and always scowling, this angry fish charges directly at any foe it sees.

name: Tangler Lv. 2
description: Lighting up its surroundings with a head-mounted lamp, this scowling fish charges straight ahead.

name: Tektite
description: Resembling a pond skater in action, this creature hops across the surface of water, jumping higher every third hop.

name: Tektite Lv. 2
description: While it has a thick shell and sharp leg spikes, the single, glaring, red eye is the dominant feature of this Tektite variant.

name: Temper Tweelus
description: When attacked, this rage-filled rock monster moves much faster and heats up to scorching before cooling again.

name: Torch Slug
description: Slimy and able to cling to walls and floors, this monster leaves a trail of flame wherever it goes. Beware.

name: Tornando
description: This mischievous monster cloaks itself in a miniature tornado and bursts out from sandstorms to knock foes backward.

name: Tweelus
description: This fire-resistant rock monster's hard exterior is still vulnerable to impact. It has a weakness for Rock Roast.

name: White Wolfos
description: Larger than a normal Wolfos, this white variant can summon its smaller kin with its howl.

name: Wolfos
description: This wolflike creature is the bane of travelers, circling ominously around them to sow fear and confusion.

name: Zirro
description: This troublesome flying monster spits a continuous rain of bombs from on high.

name: Zol
description: A weak, gelatinous monster that moves slowly by expanding and contracting.
